_comment: FaiREE × Missing Data — research roadmap. Statuses: proposed | in-progress | blocked | decided | done. Owners: you | claude | copilot. Edit via the board UI (Save button commits this file via the GitHub Contents API) or hand-edit. Schema v1.

project.name: FaiREE with Missing Data
project.summary: Extension of FaiREE (Li, Zou, Zhang, ICLR 2023) to handle Missing-Not-At-Random sensitive attribute / outcome via density-ratio estimation + group thresholding. Original FaiREE paper has no missing-data treatment; this is the new contribution.

repos.name: fairee_missing_data
repos.role: R simulation code; canonical source for the missing-data algorithm

repos.name: fairee-experiment
repos.role: Python 8-stage experiment framework; calls R for calibration via subprocess

repos.name: fairee-bulk-testing
repos.role: Large-scale batch driver over the Python pipeline

items.title: Merge PR #9 (archive/ + src/ + tests/) into master
items.detail: PR #9 splits the canonical 5-file stack into a verbatim archive/ snapshot and a cleaned src/ ready to drop into fairee-experiment, plus a zero-dependency tests/ harness. Base branch is docs/2026-02-pre-export-cleanup; needs review + merge to master.

items.title: Land PR #6 fix: index_com_y_a undefined in Density_ratios_3.R else branch
items.detail: Runtime error in denratio_con_XYA when A has no missing values — variable used but never defined. PR #6 also makes setwd() portable (RStudio + SLURM safe) and switches print()-diagnostics to warning(). Open as draft; review + merge.

items.title: Pick canonical FaiREE_shift version: _5 vs _6
items.detail: PORTING.md flags ambiguity. PR #9 chose _6 (exposes J as parameter, generalizes p_miss). Confirm and lock.

items.title: Add roxygen2 docs to every public function
items.detail: All function files lack roxygen2 documentation. Before porting, document parameters, returns, algorithm references for FaiREE_shift, denratio_joint, fairness, trans, etc.

items.title: Extract reusable MNAR data generator from Sim15_data_generation.R
items.detail: Sim15_data_generation.R mixes simulation-specific data generation with reusable utilities. Extract the reusable MNAR (No-Self-Censoring) generator as a standalone function for both R tests and Python interop.

items.title: Consolidate alpha1_0 / gamma_0 / theta_0 initialization across files
items.detail: GMM init params appear in multiple files with different defaults. Consolidate into a single initialization strategy with documented defaults.

items.title: Document NSC missing-data mechanism (alpha1_true, gamma_true, theta_true)
items.detail: NSC model parameters and their relationship to missingness probability are implicit across files. Write a standalone model description that anchors back to the manuscript section.

items.title: Decide fate of Functions sum/ snapshot dir
items.detail: Contains copies of four files that should match their counterparts in the root. No sync mechanism. Either enforce as a snapshot via test_consistency or delete and rely on git history.

items.title: Resolve open question on debugging-sample-size / debugging-sample-size-new branches
items.detail: Two side branches with sample-size-debugging commits, never merged or documented. Needs human context: what scenario broke at what n? Did this find a real bug, a configuration issue, or was it abandoned?

items.title: Untrack .RData / .Rhistory / .Rapp.history / .Rproj.user / SLURM .out files
items.detail: Binary artifacts committed alongside source. .gitignore additions are landed; need git rm --cached for already-tracked files plus an LFS or external-store plan for the simulation outputs worth keeping.

items.title: Audit unresolved Copilot review threads on PR #6 and PR #9
items.detail: Two open draft PRs from Copilot. Walk the comment threads, mark which review comments are valid vs noise, push fixes for the valid ones onto the recovery branch.

items.title: Run tests/run_all_tests.R from PR #9 against the canonical src/
items.detail: Test harness wired locally; PR #9 archive vs src consistency tests are out of scope here.

items.title: Wire R tests to GitHub Actions (R-CMD-check style)
items.detail: No CI on this repo today. Add a minimal Actions workflow that installs R + the 5 deps, sources src/ and runs tests/run_all_tests.R on PR.

items.title: FaiREE_shift smoke test on MNAR toy data from PORTING.md
items.detail: Promoted to tests/test_fairee_missing.py::test_fit_predict_basic (Python smoke; R version still open as part of R-1).

items.title: Seeded reproducibility test for the Sim15 generator
items.detail: Most Sim*.R scripts don't set a seed or set one without recording it. Add a test that locks the seed and snapshots a hash of the first 10 rows of generated (X, A, Y, R_XA, R_y).

items.title: CRITICAL: make src/engine/ importable (add __init__.py + fix statsup→engine imports)
items.detail: Merged effectively: PR fairee-experiment#20 has __init__.py at every level + statsup→engine import fix. CI green.

items.title: Land PR #4 (high-level io_map doc)
items.detail: PR #4 is the single source of truth for the 8-stage pipeline and porting-status audit. Open as draft — review + merge to main so the rest of the team / Copilot can plan against it.

items.title: Land PR #9 (R interop wrapper: fairee_missing.R + train_cal_wrapper.R)
items.detail: Provides the R-side calibration entry point + a Rscript CLI wrapper that reads cal CSV and writes group thresholds CSV. Cross-check it tracks the canonical R src/ chosen by R-1.

items.title: Implement Router (src/engine/data/router/router.py)
items.detail: Implemented in src/engine/data/router/router.py — alias normalize + canonical-config hash + registry bootstrap. Tests cover module import (TP-2). See fairee-experiment#20.

items.title: Implement Data Store (src/engine/data/store.py)
items.detail: Implemented in src/engine/data/store.py — fcntl-locked NDJSON append/read + per-batch timestamps. See fairee-experiment#20.

items.title: Add organized config YAMLs (exp/configs/{algo,data/sim,pipelines}/)
items.detail: Three orthogonal axes (algo, data, pipeline). Replaces ad-hoc example.yaml with composable per-component configs.

items.title: Implement run_once(cfg) pipeline runner
items.detail: Implemented in src/engine/pipelines/runner.py — run_once(cfg) + sweep(grid, repeats). Drives the v0.1 sim_sweep + adult_benchmark. See fairee-experiment#20.

items.title: Implement Analysis Export (metrics → LaTeX tables + plots)
items.detail: Implemented in src/engine/analysis/{metrics,export}.py — accuracy / EOO / EO / DP gaps + aggregate_sweep + write_tex_table + plot_metric_vs. See fairee-experiment#20.

items.title: Decide: Python-only port vs R-subprocess interop (perf tradeoff)
items.detail: Strong recommendation: Python-only port. Justification: (1) the R train_cal subprocess adds ~0.5 s/call overhead and prevents the FairBayes-shrinkage O(n M) speedup; (2) my v0.1 Python FaiREE-missing reproduces the R Beta-test machinery; (3) the R density-ratio estimator can be ported in O(1 day) (TODO item P-9 below).

items.title: Wire train_cal_wrapper.R CSV protocol into the Python pipeline
items.detail: Once P-3 lands and P-7 exists, add an 'r-calibrator' method module that writes cal CSV, shells out to Rscript, reads thresholds CSV.

items.title: Integration test: Python generate → R calibrate → Python apply
items.detail: End-to-end interop test; gated on R available in the CI runner (apt install r-base + the 5 packages).

items.title: Restore CI lint+format (disabled during early dev per PR #5)
items.detail: PR #5 stripped lint/format from CI 'for now'. Re-enable once the engine package is importable (P-1) and there's stable code to format.

items.title: Smoke test that imports the full engine package
items.detail: tests/test_engine_imports.py: 12 module-level smoke imports cover engine.{utils,data.router.router,data.store,analysis.{metrics,export},pipelines.runner} + fairee.algo.{fairee,fairee_missing,fast_compute}. Green in CI.

items.title: End-to-end test of one sim config (data → train → calibrate → predict → metrics)
items.detail: tests/test_fairee_missing.py + sim_sweep.py end-to-end on 180 configs (n × alpha × method × seed).

items.title: Numerical parity: Python FaiREE_EOO vs R fairness() on identical calibration data
items.detail: Hidden-bug detector: load a fixed (scores, A, Y) CSV, run Python FaiREE_EOO and R fairness() with the same alpha/delta, assert thresholds within tolerance. Catches algorithm-drift early.

items.title: Survey fairee-bulk-testing current state
refs: main vs refactor branches at same SHA
items.detail: main and refactor are at the same commit. Either the refactor is complete (and the branch should be merged) or never started. Investigate.

items.title: Wire batch driver to consume engine/ run_once
items.detail: Bulk testing should import the same engine package as fairee-experiment and sweep over the YAML config matrix. Depends on P-7.

items.title: Reproduce the Sim15 scenario sweep from the R suite
items.detail: R suite has Sim15_2 / _3 / _4 / _5 / _6 / _7 / _17 with different sample sizes / mechanisms. Need a curated scenario list — likely the ones used in the manuscript figures (see M-3).

items.title: Confirm manuscript scope: how missing-data extension positions vs original FaiREE
items.detail: Original FaiREE (Li, Zou, Zhang, ICLR 2023) handles EOO/EO/DP but has no missing-data treatment. Confirm the missing-data extension positioning (companion paper, journal extension, or new contribution).

items.title: Reconcile in-repo main.tex with Overleaf draft
items.detail: There are two manuscript sources: an in-repo main.tex (FaiREE_with_Covariate_Shift.pdf) and the Overleaf project. Decide which is canonical and sync.

items.title: Lock the figure/table list paper needs from Analysis Export
items.detail: P-8 (Analysis Export) needs a concrete schema. Provide the manuscript's table/figure list (which metrics, which scenarios, which baselines) so the export can be wired once.

items.title: Cite paragraphs needing cleaned R/Python code (which methods are claimed)
items.detail: Walk the manuscript and tag which method paragraphs map to which R/Python source files. Anchors the code-side documentation effort (R-4, R-7).

items.title: Recovery branch claude/recover-dev-intent-eQY0u live across 5 repos
items.detail: Branch exists in yulinl2.github.io and fairee-experiment as of this commit. Create on fairee_missing_data / fairee-bulk-testing / fairee on demand.

items.title: This decision board (fairee-board/)
items.detail: Static, self-contained under fairee-board/; mirrors the statsupai-revamp/ pattern; not consumed by Jekyll's themed build.

items.title: PAT-backed save-to-repo for the board
items.detail: Browser commits roadmap.json via the GitHub Contents API with a user-supplied fine-grained PAT (Contents: Read+Write on this repo only). Token lives only in localStorage.

items.title: Audit unresolved Copilot review threads across all 4 dev repos
items.detail: Catalogue + triage in the style of yulinl2.github.io PR #28. Pull valid points into the recovery branches; close noise threads.

items.title: Promote recovery branch to draft PR in every repo it touches
items.detail: Draft PRs make the work reviewable + give CI a target. Created for yulinl2.github.io and fairee-experiment in this turn.

items.title: Python FaiREE-missing algorithm (FaiREEMissingEOO)
items.detail: IPW-reweighted FaiREE-EOO with pessimistic prediction on missing-A test rows; histogram density-ratio placeholder + NSC plug-in slot. Vectorized Beta test via fast_compute.py (~3-5x faster).

items.title: v0.1 sim sweep — naive vs CC-FaiREE vs FaiREE-missing
items.detail: 180 runs (n × alpha × method × seed=5). Headline: naive EOO gap ~0.20; FaiREE-missing @ alpha=0.10, n=4000: 0.034 (within budget) with -3 pp accuracy. Boundary degeneracy at alpha=0.05, small n explained by sample-complexity bound. Tables + 3 plots committed.

items.title: Adult Census benchmark with MNAR injection
items.detail: 8 reps × 3 alpha × 2 miss_A × 2 miss_y × 3 methods = 288 runs (~7 min). Headline: FaiREE-EOO at no missingness matches arxiv 2211.15072 Table 3 (ACC=0.847, |DEOO|=0.043 at alpha=0.10). With 20% A+Y missing the gap stays at 0.054, accuracy unchanged at 0.848. Naive's gap grows from 0.081 to 0.107 under missingness; FaiREE-missing's pessimistic high-threshold rule on missing-A test rows keeps it controlled.

items.title: Truth document + first-principles theory pass
items.detail: Beta-quantile proposition derived from scratch from arxiv 2211.15072 main.tex; intrinsic complexity calibrated (O(n M) with shrinkage vs O(n²M) grid); 3 explicit assumptions catalogued (NSC, no outcome shift across ξ, bounded density ratio); known places where finite-sample guarantee does not trivially transfer.

items.title: Three generator bugs in exp/methods/sim/generator.py — fixed
items.detail: (1) X_obs slice mismatch in _generate_missing_indicators_XA → einsum failure. (2) _compute_miss_mech_accl returns n-vector; caller expected scalar. (3) NaN-mask shape mismatch on dataset.features assignment + stale dataset.protected_attributes copy. All 3 fixed in this push; the original sanity_check() would never have passed pre-fix.

items.title: Manuscript draft trio (methodology + theory + experiments)
items.detail: Cross-check stream against Overleaf. Surfaces 3 tensions: DP vs EOO scope; synthesis vs IPW for missing-data treatment; block vs NSC missingness model. Recommendation: EOO + IPW + NSC for v1.

items.title: Port denratio_joint (NSC GMM) from R Density_ratios_3.R to Python
items.detail: v0.1 uses a histogram balanced-class placeholder. Replacing with the NSC GMM plug-in will (i) make fairee_missing actually differ from CC-FaiREE in the sweep, (ii) unblock the headline experimental claim.

items.title: Port FairBayes shrinkage formula to fairee_missing.py
items.detail: Drops candidate-set scan from O(n²M) to O(nM) via the analytical t¹¹_best formula. Required for tractable runs at n ≥ 8000. Skipped in v0.1 (grid-strided proxy used instead).

items.title: DECISION: Scope = Demographic Parity vs Equalized Odds / Equal Opportunity?
items.detail: Stub manuscript says f(x) ⊥ a (DP). Code + paper baseline = EOO/EO. Pick one; everything downstream (theorems, experiments, plots) depends on this.

items.title: DECISION: Missing-data treatment = synthesis vs IPW reweighting?
items.detail: Stub proposes synthetic-data substitution for missing-sensitive rows. Code uses IPW/density-ratio under NSC. The methods are not equivalent and have different theory. Pick the canonical path; the other becomes a §A variant.

items.title: DECISION: Missingness model = block (K-pattern) vs NSC (arbitrary patterns)?
items.detail: Stub partitions subjects into K disjoint blocks. NSC admits all 2^p_miss patterns. NSC strictly generalizes; block is a corollary. The code uses NSC.

items.title: WARNING: Assumption (M3) — Beta-quantile under IPW weights is not finite-sample-exact
items.detail: Rank exchangeability gives the original Beta marginal. Weights break exchangeability; integer-rounding k_eff is a working proxy but the resulting guarantee is asymptotic, not finite-sample. Either re-derive (weighted-bootstrap or proper conformal-w/-weights) OR weaken the theorem statement to asymptotic + finite-sample remainder.

items.title: WARNING: Assumption (M2/Assumption 2) — no outcome shift across ξ is restrictive
items.detail: P(Y|X,A) must NOT depend on the missing-group label. Violated, the IPW TPR estimator is biased. The data-generating code does NOT violate this, but real data (e.g., Adult with conditional MAR) might. We should report a doubly-robust diagnostic.
